label: Order Summary
description: Six KPIs showing total, open, partially filled, filled, rejected, and failed order counts.

checks.0.1_error_boundary: pass — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89
checks.0.4_no_any_ts_ignore: pass — no any or @ts-ignore in widget file
checks.0.5_no_mock_imports: pass — widget file imports only from context and shared components
checks.0.6_loading_state: pass — isLoading guard renders "—" for all metric values
checks.0.7_empty_state: pass — KPI strip shows zeros when no orders (valid state for a summary strip)
checks.0.8_error_state: fixed — added error guard: renders rose error message when context.error is set
checks.0.9_dead_code: pass — no commented-out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: Fixed 0.8: orders-data-context exposes error but the widget was not reading it. Added error early-return before metrics array.

checks.1.1_data_from_context: pass — reads summary and isLoading exclusively via useOrdersData()
checks.1.2_context_uses_global_scope: pass — orders-data-context.tsx line 145: useGlobalScope(); scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope
checks.1.3_org_filter: pass — scopedOrders filters by scopeStrategyIds (org→client→strategy cascade) in context
checks.1.4_client_filter: pass — getStrategyIdsForScope() accepts clientIds; context line 178-185
checks.1.5_strategy_filter: pass — strategyFilter state in context + scopeStrategyIds chain covers strategy-level scoping
checks.1.6_no_filter_shows_all: pass — scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 means no filtering (context line 253-255)
checks.1.7_reference_data_location: pass — widget itself has no reference data; context uses getOrdersForScope from lib/mocks/fixtures (read-only concern)

l1.notes: Context (read-only): imports from lib/mocks/fixtures and lib/mocks/generators are acceptable mock-data paths for dev mode; not a widget-file concern per spec.

findings.description: Widget was not reading error from useOrdersData(). Added error guard returning a rose error message.
